'''Debnoli''' was a [[Sniper/Legends|marksman]] who frequented [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Cantina]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]]. He sought revenge on the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] for impounding his ship.<ref name="CCG">{{CCG|set=Special Edition Limited|cardname=Debnoli}}</ref> From time to time, Debnoli worked with [[Bron Burs]], a former commando from the planet [[Nentan]].<ref name="CCGBronBurs">{{CCG|set=Special Edition Limited|cardname=Bron Burs}}</ref>

In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], the smuggler [[Gela Yeens]], who also worked for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] as a debt collector, was searching for him.<ref name="CCGGelaYeens">{{CCG|set=Special Edition Limited|cardname=Gela Yeens}}</ref> Debnoli was present in the Mos Eisley cantina when [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]] was killed by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].<ref name="ANH" />

==Behind the scenes==
Debnoli first appeared as an uncredited Cantina patron in [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']]. According to [[Tom Spina]], he was portrayed in the film by an uncredited [[George Oliver]].<ref name="Tom Spina Confirmation">{{EmailCite|email=File:DianSadleyWayPProof.png|creator=Tom Spina|date=2021-06-12}}</ref>
